title: Chef Aid Traditional Style Food Scoop, Trigger Design for Easy Release and Ideal for Ice Cream and Mashed Potato, Also Great for Measuring Cookie Dough

BOW ACTION: Designed for the best results and the mechanism will effortlessly release the food from the scoop making this great for food preparation or for serving
SHAPED HANDLE: The Handle is shaped to fit comfortably in the handle to allowpressure to be applied accros the full handle
DISHWASHER SAFE: Being Made for high grade Chrome this Kitchen Gadget is Dishwasher Safe
